comment: perf-pass-3 latency-validator playwright capture, synthetic mode. BUFFER_TARGET_SECS = 0.05 (post-fix). Captured 2026-05-11.
backend: Zeus.Server Release on :6080, ZEUS_PERF_TEST=1, synthetic engine emitting 2048-sample silence frames at 30 Hz
frontend: Vite dev :5193 proxying :6080, Chrome via playwright MCP

audioStatsAfter10Cycles.note: droppedSamples high because synthetic emits 2048/33ms = 42.7ms of audio every 33ms tick (1.28x speed); BUFFER_MAX_SECS=0.5 drop-far-ahead protection fires. Real HL2 produces 1024 samples / 21.3 ms per tick so the over-production doesn't happen. underrunCount=0 is the metric that matters.

summary.wall_clock_note: the variance in wall-clock t4-t0 (19-34ms) is the wait for the next 30 Hz pipeline Tick plus broadcast+decode. Median ~22ms matches the predicted 0-33ms tick wait + ~1-2ms transport.
